expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 생성된다 (예: useSignupForm)
expectations.evidence: useSignupForm hook created at app/signup/hooks/useSignupForm/index.ts, managing all form state (name, email, password, confirmPassword, errors, generalError) via useState.

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 생성된다 (예: useSignup)
expectations.evidence: No separate submit hook (e.g. useSignup) was created. The submit logic (handleSubmit calling signup and router.push) is embedded inside useSignupForm rather than extracted into a dedicated hook.

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: The hook is named useSignupForm, which starts with 'use'.
Hook file is at app/signup/hooks/useSignupForm/index.ts, matching the {hookName}/index.ts pattern.

expectations.text: page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains only UI rendering with JSX. All useState, validation, useAuth, useRouter, and submit logic were moved into the hook. The page only imports and destructures useSignupForm.
useSignupForm/index.ts line 24: `if (password !== confirmPassword) errs.confirmPassword = "비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다"`. The page renders the confirmPassword error at line 81.

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: Hook defined as `const useSignupForm = () => { ... }` -- arrow function syntax.

expectations.text: 이벤트 핸들러가 handle 접두사를 사용한다 (shared profile: internal handler = handle*)
expectations.evidence: The submit handler is named `handleSubmit` (line 28 of the hook), using the handle prefix.
